log.text: [char:Brek Ossun], the night tender, found the body on the [loc:dye_works] floor at first light and has not left the building since. He was working the vats all night and may have seen or heard something.

[char:Thessa Vel] summoned the investigator herself. She says she may have been the last person to speak with [char:Sura Vel-Mak] before she died, and that Sura left the [loc:elder_hall] heading toward the [loc:archive_chamber] shortly before the trouble began.

[char:Pira Eddan], the mineral assayer, was called to examine the body before dawn and has been in the [loc:assay_room] ever since, recording her observations. She has already made notes that she has not yet shared with anyone.
Word has reached the investigator at [loc:harbour_dock] — [char:Sura Vel-Mak] has been found at [loc:dye_works]. The investigation begins.

The investigator encounters [char:Davan Reach] at [loc:harbour_dock]. The harbour master of Vel-Drassik, weathered and deliberate, with the calm manner of a man accustomed to managing other people's panic. He is the first to meet the investigator's boat, a lantern in one hand and a cold-log tucked under his arm.
